'''RGA-972'''<ref name="JKTCG" /> was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="Complete Visual Dictionary" /> [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtrooper]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="JKTCG" /> He was an assault specialist with training in the use of many heavy weapons, including the [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]].<ref name="JKTCG2" />

In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], after the Empire discovered a hidden [[Echo Base/Legends|Rebel base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> RGA-972 participated in<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|98|RGA-972}}</ref> the subsequent [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|ground assault]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]<ref name="NEC" /> and invaded the Rebel base.<ref name="CSWE" /> The battle ended with an Imperial victory and the Alliance evacuating Hoth.<ref name="NEC" /> RGA-972 wore the standard suit of [[Snowtrooper armor/Legends|snowtrooper armor]] and wielded an [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]].<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
RGA-972 was created for a card in the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'', released in [[2001]].<ref name="JKTCG" />
